form.formComment: Racing well without winning, recording four minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (30.49) over 520m at this track. Excellent record from this draw, including two wins. Go well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing well without winning, recording four minors on end, the latest hitting the ground running with a fast early sectional but finishing in the minors again when third (30.49) over 520m at this track. Excellent record from this draw, including two wins. Go well.

form.formComment: Placed last time (21.68) at Q Lakeside in a Grade 5, finishing second and beaten 2 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from four starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 520m in 29.71. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 520m at this track at Grade 5 level. Leading chance on best form.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Q Lakeside over 457m in 25.33 last start, beating Appeal. Among the chances and worth following up.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 457m at Q Lakeside. Others preferred on this occasion.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start by 1.5 lengths at Dubbo (29.70) beating Armatree Judo in a Mix on March 28. The last run is a strong form reference. Follow up.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. Last start finished sixth over 457m at Q Lakeside, beaten 6 lengths. Not up to this.

form.formComment: Showing promise but missed the frame last start when fifth at Casino. Form solid prior to that including a win at this track three back. Has ability and looks one of the hopes in this.
